UI_Trait_Fertile_Description:
You are very fertile
- Higher chance of getting pregnant
- +50% fertility
UI_Trait_Infertile_Description:
You are infertile
You Can't get pregnant
UI_Trait_Hyperfertile_Description:
You are HYPER fertile
- +100% fertility, Halves the time before being ready to get pregnant again after birth
UI_Trait_DairyCow_Description: Increases milk production rate (+25%) and time lactating (+25%)
UI_Trait_StrongMenstrualCramps_Descripti:
You have more debilitating menstrual cramps
- Menstrual cramps 2x stronger
UI_Trait_NoMenstrualCramps_Description:
You hardly feel menstrual cramps
- You menstruation does not have any bad effect
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_a7F3k9: Keep condoms at hand so you can react quickly when needed.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_x2L9pQ: Stress and poor rest can make difficult days feel worse. Plan calmer tasks when needed.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_mN8vT1: Track your menstrual cycle rhythm in a journal to prepare food, meds, and travel plans ahead of time.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_R4sW0z: If you can lactate, stay hydrated and fed to support milk production.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_Kp3Xc8: Keep a small stash of condoms in your inventory. You might need them.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_B7dL2n: Privacy can be rare. Choose safe locations carefully when you need time for yourself.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_Q9yE6r: Extra calories are important when you are eating for two.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_U5jM8a: Always have a backup plan… and a backup for that backup.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_W2nC4x: Sometimes survival means knowing when to say no… and when not to.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_T8hV1k: Protection is lighter than responsibility. Pack accordingly.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_J6pZ3b: Late nights and bad decisions are still a thing. Plan ahead.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_F1qR9m: Energy management matters… especially when things get physical.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_L0vS7d: A safe place isn't just about zombies.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_E3uH5c: Hydration helps with more than just stamina.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_P8wK2t: Cleanliness can prevent more problems than you think.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_Y1oN6f: Privacy is rare. Choose your moments wisely.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_Z4gD9l: Some consequences take up to 9 months to show up.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_C7bU3q: Your priorities might change faster than your situation.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_V2xJ8n: If you can produce it, you can store it. Containers matter more than you think.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_M9rA5s: Milk is food, hydration, and survival! All in one, if you manage it right.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_D6tP4e: Regular expression can prevent discomfort and wasted resources.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_H3kY1u: Your body can become a resource generator. Treat it with care.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_S5cF8o: Not all fluids are equal. Know what you're carrying before you drink.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_G1zL7x: Label your containers… trust me on this one.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_N4mQ2v: Overproduction without management can become a problem.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_O8pR6a: Some resources are renewable. If you stay healthy.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_I2eW9k: Improvised storage works… until it doesn't.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_A7nB3y: Uninvited guests? You can push them out in pretty much any container you have on hand.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_X5tC1h: Don't forget to take your contraceptives with you. You never know when you'll need them.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_U9vK4p: Contraceptives works best when used consistently. Don't let the apocalypse be an excuse to forget.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_R6sJ2d: Want to increase your milk production? Look for lactaid pills in the world.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_W3xF8q: Avoid Sex during ovulation. The last thing you need is to be pregnant in the middle of the apocalypse.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_T1mP5c: Pumping milk can help maintain production and prevent discomfort. Just make sure to have a safe place to do it.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_Y8kL3v: Using a Breast Pump is faster than manually expressing and yield more milk. If you can find one, it's worth to keep it.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_Q2dH7n: You will be vunerable during labor. Make sure you have a safe place to give birth.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_Z9aS4x: A Vaginal douche can be used to clean yourself, but it won't prevent pregnancy. Don't rely on it for protection.
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_b3K8pL: In Knox Country, the most dangerous countdown is not always a helicopter event.
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_c7R2xQ: Prepared survivors fear no alarm clock, no horde, and definitely no surprise pregnancies.
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_d1V9mZ: Zombies aren't the only thing that shows up uninvited.
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_e5N4tB: You can barricade windows, but what about your pussy?
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_f8J6yH: Some status effects don't come from bites.
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_g2W3cX: When it rains, it pours… sometimes literally, sometimes not.
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_h9P1sE: You thought inventory management was hard already.
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_i4D7uK: Not every risky encounter involves zombies.
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_j6F8aM: You survived the night. The question is, what did it cost you?
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_k3L5zN: Some needs are harder to ignore than a distant groan.
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_l7X2rT: Even in the apocalypse, someone forgets to bring protection.
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_m1C9qU: Zombies aren't the only thing that spreads.
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_n5B4wS: Inventory check: water, food, ammo… and condoms?
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_o8H6vD: You'll never look at an empty bottle the same way again.
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_p2T7kA: Resourceful survivors waste nothing. Absolutely nothing.
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_q9E3mJ: Some drinks have more protein in them than others.
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_r4Y8nF: Hope you labeled that bottle correctly.
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_t6Z2pR: You *did* check what was in that bottle before drinking, right?
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_u3K9dL: Survival rule: don't ask, don't sniff, just drink it.
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_v8M1aP: You cannot get pregnant when using the back door.
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_w5Q7cX: When life gives you lemons, make lemonade. When life gives you a uterus, make… well, you know.
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_x2B6hN: You have multiple holes, use them wisely
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_y9D3tF: Do not trust in the pull-out method
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_z1G8kV: Do not waste a good source of protein
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_a4J7mS: Sex is like math; you add the bed, subtract the clothes, divide the legs and pray you don't multiply.
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_b6N2pT: Your womb is not a pool, keep the swimmers out of it!
